---
name: EJLive Codex Task
about: Execute one strict Codex task only
title: "[Codex] Command XXX - <Task Name>"
labels: [codex, phase2, guarded]
assignees: ''
---

## Command file
Paste the content of one file from `commands/` here. Do not combine multiple commands.

## Boundaries
- Execute only this command.
- Do not modify unrelated layers.
- Do not add features outside acceptance criteria.
- Run restore/build/test/verification.

## Required result
- Pull request or patch summary
- Modified files
- Tests
- Verification logs
- Rollback plan
